expect: FM-21 and FM-25 hardened from UNMITIGATED to MINIMAL. FMEA refresh: 0 new FMs or 1-2 at NAT cycle. Total FM count 39+.
actual: Expectation FALSIFIED: FM-21 already ADEQUATE (S490), FM-25 already MINIMAL (S475). Root cause: FM-41 (FMEA tracking drift) caused reconcile tool to show stale status. Fix: (1) fmea_reconcile.py updated to read status_change field from hardening artifacts. (2) Corrective artifacts created for FM-31 (S452 fix) and FM-36 (S456 fix). Result: UNMITIGATED count 4→1 (only FM-41 itself remains). FM-41 UNMITIGATED→MINIMAL (this fix IS the defense layer). Two new FM candidates identified: FM-42 (dispatch attention monopoly, Gini 0.611) and FM-43 (periodic-gate erosion at scale, 58% drift in 122 sessions).
diff: Expected to harden FM-21/FM-25. Got: both already hardened — the REAL gap was FM-41 (meta-tracking). 3 ghost UNMITIGATED FMs resolved (FM-31, FM-36, FM-40). This is a second-order failure: the failure registry's own maintenance was the failure mode. Pattern: every monitoring system eventually needs a monitor for the monitor (L-601 applies to FMEA tracking itself).
